note: Each prompt is generated as: styleSignature (brand.json) + subjectPrompt. Scenes/textures -> webp via tools/imgkit.py webp. Icons/logo -> generate on solid pure-white background, then `tools/imgkit.py keyout` to transparent PNG. Keep the same `seed` across assets where the engine honours it. Fill this list in during Stage 1 (declare a slot for every image the page needs) and generate in Stage 3.

assets.subjectPrompt: A minimal logo emblem on a solid pure white background: <describe mark>. Flat vector, two-tone <colors>.
<describe the hero scene>. Leave open area where headline copy sits.
Minimal line-art icon of <thing> on solid pure white. Matches the icon set.
Wide horizontal button texture, even lighting for centered text. No objects, no text.
